summary: Full testing of Agent IA PMO module. 14/14 backend tests pass. All frontend flows working correctly: floating button, drawer chat, recommendations page (12 recs, 6 critical), alert rules CRUD, what-if simulation detection.
critical_code_review_comments: service.py is 661 lines — consider splitting build_pmo_context, validate_response into separate utils module for maintainability
In chat(), the guardrail validate_response is called after DB persist — if validation triggers warnings, they are stored but user is already informed. This is fine, just note it.
Silent except blocks in frontend Recommandations.jsx and MesAlertes.jsx (catch {}) swallow errors silently — consider logging to console at minimum for debugging

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all flows work: drawer, chat, recommendations (12 cards, 6 critical), alert rules create/list/toggle/delete

seed_data_creation: 2 test alert rules created during testing (1 from backend test cleaned up, 1 'Alerte dépassement EAC > 10%' and 1 'Test alerte UI' remain in DB for admin user)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agent IA PMO module fully tested and working. Backend 14/14. Frontend: floating 'Agent IA PMO' button (data-testid=agent-drawer-toggle) at bottom-right opens drawer. Chat with Claude works (15s latency). Recommandations page at /agent/recommandations shows 12 recommendations (6 critical, 6 warning) with badges. MesAlertes page at /agent/alertes shows CRUD working. What-if detection working (is_simulation=true for 'si on annule' type questions). Note: recommendations-widget is visible on dashboard but takes ~3s to load (dashboard has initial loading state).
mocked_apis: Jira/SAP/ServiceNow syncs MOCKED. Claude API (claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929) is REAL via emergentintegrations.
